contentPack.invalidRows: Fix or remove invalid pack entries before importing.
contentPack.refreshAfterImport: World files, pages, and search refresh after import.
llm.title: Assistant
llm.contextPlaceholder: Paste the text that may be sent to the LLM.
llm.contextEmpty: No context yet. Use active document or type explicit text.
llm.forms.summarize.title: Summarize
llm.forms.summarize.description: Condense explicit notes or selected text for table use.
llm.forms.rumors.title: Rumors
llm.forms.rumors.description: Create table-ready rumors from supplied truths.
llm.forms.handout-rewrite.title: Handout Rewrite
llm.forms.consequences.title: Consequences
llm.forms.consequences.description: Explore fallout from an explicit event.
llm.forms.draft-card.title: Draft Card
llm.forms.draft-card.description: Draft untrusted NPC, location, item, or card JSON.
llm.forms.recap.title: Recap
llm.forms.recap.description: Turn explicit session notes into a recap.
help.world-tree.title: World Files Help
help.world-tree.body1: Open files from the tree; right-click files or folders for rename, duplicate, favorite, and trash actions.
help.world-tree.body2: Drag files or folders onto another folder to reorganize the world.
help.world-tree.body3: Use the filter and Collapse All when the world gets dense.
help.world-tree.shortcut1: F1 opens help for the focused area.
help.document-empty.title: Workspace Help
help.document-empty.body1: Select a file from World files or use Search to open prepared material.
help.document-empty.body2: Use New Card, Capture, or Prep Check from the workspace controls when preparing.
help.document-empty.body3: Open tools only when needed; pinned tools stay visible.
help.document-markdown.title: Markdown Help
help.document-markdown.body1: Double-click the preview to edit the note.
help.document-markdown.body2: Use wiki links to open, peek, stage, or show related world content.
help.document-markdown.body3: File actions such as rename, favorite, and trash live in the world-tree context menu.
help.document-markdown.shortcut1: Ctrl+S saves, Esc returns to preview when clean, Ctrl+\ toggles split preview.
help.document-csv.title: Table Help
help.document-csv.body1: Edit tables directly; plus buttons add rows or columns.
help.document-csv.body2: Small x buttons remove rows or columns from the draft before save.
help.document-csv.body3: CSV links can still open, peek, stage, or show world content.
help.document-card.title: Card Help
help.document-card.body1: Cards are structured JSON shown as compact sheets.
help.document-card.body2: Edit sections, fields, tables, links, and computed display-only fields in Edit mode.
help.document-card.body3: Use card templates from New Card or world-local template files.
help.document-card.shortcut1: Ctrl+S saves card edits; Shift+Esc asks before revert.
help.document-dms.title: DMS Script Help
help.document-dms.body1: DMS scripts are trusted local Python run by the backend environment.
help.document-dms.body2: Use form(), render_md(), table(), screen_*(), audio_play(), and card helpers for controlled output.
help.document-dms.body3: Write commands apply only after the script finishes successfully.
help.document-dms.shortcut1: Run is in the document header and the Scripts tool.
help.document-media.title: Media Help
help.document-media.body1: Images, PDFs, and videos can be previewed in the DM workspace.
help.document-media.body2: Use Screen actions to show supported media to players.
help.document-media.body3: Use the path picker where a tool needs an exact world-relative path.
help.document-media.shortcut1: F1 shows the current media cheat sheet.
help.metadata.title: Metadata Help
help.metadata.body1: Metadata shows title, tags, aliases, outgoing links, and backlinks for the active file.
help.metadata.body2: Edit metadata only when the file content has no unsaved changes.
help.metadata.body3: Backlinks and outgoing links help you navigate related prep quickly.
help.metadata.shortcut1: Save metadata from the Metadata tool when editing.
help.screen-display.title: Screen Display Help
help.screen-display.body1: Use Blank Screen as the panic button for player output.
help.screen-display.body2: Stage popups before showing them, or show the active file directly.
help.screen-display.body3: Clear Popups removes visible and staged popups.
help.screen-display.shortcut1: Open /screen on the player display before play.
help.screen-map.title: Map Help
help.screen-map.body1: Load an image map in Setup, then Present Map to the player screen.
help.screen-map.body2: Live controls manage fog, reveal/hide boxes, polygon fog edits, pins, measuring, and viewport.
help.screen-map.body3: Map presets save the current map setup for reuse.
help.screen-map.shortcut1: Esc closes dialogs; map canvas focus stays on map actions.
help.audio.title: Audio Help
help.audio.body1: Ambient, Music, and Effect buses are independent.
help.audio.body2: Use folder playlists or saved playlists, then use Next, Previous, Loop, Fade, or Stop.
help.audio.body3: Stop All is immediate and only affects the DM browser playback.
help.audio.shortcut1: Fast slots and bindings can trigger audio actions.
help.dice.title: Dice Help
help.dice.body1: Roll quick dice with the common dice buttons or type an expression like 1d20+3.
help.dice.body2: Results show each die and the final sum.
help.dice.body3: Roll links in notes, tables, and cards trigger the DM Dice tool only.
help.dice.shortcut1: Enter rolls when the dice expression field is focused.
help.assistant.title: Assistant Help
help.assistant.body1: Prompt forms use only the fields and context you explicitly include.
help.assistant.body2: Context preview shows what will be sent and trims long text before generation.
help.assistant.body3: Draft card JSON is treated as an untrusted draft until reviewed and saved.
help.assistant.shortcut1: Generate runs the selected prompt form.
help.hp.title: HP Help
help.hp.body1: Track temporary HP rows for the current workspace.
help.hp.body2: Use quick damage/heal adjustments during play.
help.hp.body3: Save keeps the scratchpad for this workspace; Clear removes current rows.
help.hp.shortcut1: F1 shows HP controls while this tool is focused.
help.actions-slots.title: Fast Slots Help
help.actions-slots.body1: Slots are quick buttons for opening files, showing content, audio, scripts, maps, and snapshots.
help.actions-slots.body2: Use Pick beside path fields instead of typing exact paths.
help.actions-slots.body3: Slots without a path can target the active file where supported.
help.actions-slots.shortcut1: Number keys trigger configured fast slots when focus is not in an editor.
help.actions-state.title: Snapshot Help
help.actions-state.body1: Snapshots save table state such as screen, popups, map, workspace, and audio.
help.actions-state.body2: Review the summary before loading a snapshot.
help.actions-state.body3: Loading a snapshot changes live state, so confirm carefully.
help.actions-state.shortcut1: Use Actions > State for session-state restore.
help.actions-keys.title: Keyboard Bindings Help
help.actions-keys.body1: Keyboard bindings trigger the same action types as fast slots.
help.actions-keys.body3: Keep labels short so live controls stay scannable.
help.actions-keys.shortcut1: Use non-browser shortcuts such as Ctrl+Shift+M.
help.actions-midi.title: MIDI Help
help.actions-midi.body1: Connect Web MIDI, learn a control, then bind it to an action.
help.actions-midi.body2: MIDI fields stay hidden until a device is connected or learning starts.
help.actions-midi.body3: Run a binding from the list to test it before play.
help.actions-midi.shortcut1: Use Learn to capture the next MIDI control.
help.scripts.title: Scripts Tool Help
help.scripts.body1: The Scripts tool lists saved .dms files after they are scanned.
help.scripts.body2: Run saved scripts here or from the active script editor.
help.scripts.body3: Command examples show common DMS functions for output, tables, audio, and cards.
help.scripts.shortcut1: Open the Scripts tool to refresh saved script visibility.
help.search.title: Search Help
help.search.body1: Search finds titles, aliases, tags, metadata, body text, cards, tables, and scripts.
help.search.body2: Use row actions to open, open in the other pane, peek, stage, or show results.
help.search.body3: Keyboard navigation moves through results without leaving the palette.
help.capture.title: Capture Help
help.capture.body1: Capture writes deliberate notes to the daily Markdown log.
help.capture.body2: Choose a category chip, write the note, and save explicitly.
help.capture.body3: The draft stays local until saved.
help.prep-health.title: Prep Check Help
help.prep-health.body1: Prep Check scans for broken links, missing embeds, and DMS literal-path issues.
help.prep-health.body2: Use filters to narrow errors, warnings, links, or DMS issues.
help.prep-health.body3: Open Source jumps to the file; Copy Target copies the unresolved reference.
help.prep-health.shortcut1: Run Prep Check on demand before play.
help.path-picker.title: Path Picker Help
help.path-picker.body1: The picker fills existing path fields; it does not change files by itself.
help.path-picker.body2: Search by title, filename, path, alias, or type depending on the filter.
help.path-picker.body3: Double-click a result or press Enter to use the selected path.
help.settings.title: Settings Help
help.settings.body1: Settings controls the DM UI language and is the planned home for content-pack import.
help.settings.body2: Import Pack will choose a ZIP, preview files, require conflict decisions, skip .dms files, and then show a summary.
help.settings.body3: Language choice is stored in this browser; player screen output does not show DM settings.
unlock.label: VirtualScreen Unlock
unlock.description: Enter the local table access code to unlock this session.
world.libraryNotLoaded: World library is not loaded yet.
world.name: World name
workspace.openFromTree: Open Markdown, CSV, or media from the world tree.
tools.title: Tools
document.saveOutputHint: Save this output into the world before closing it.
document.fileActionsHint: File actions are in the world tree context menu.
document.markdownShortcuts: Double-click preview to edit. Ctrl+S saves, Esc previews when clean, Ctrl+\ toggles split, Shift+Esc reverts.
document.defaultShortcuts: Double-click preview to edit. Ctrl+S saves, Esc previews when clean, Shift+Esc reverts.

metadata.selectFile: Select a file to inspect page metadata.
screen.selectTarget: Select a supported file or choose a target path before sending content to the screen.
audio.openLibrary: Open the audio library to load tracks.
audio.noSavedTracks: No tracks in this saved playlist.
audio.noCurrentTrack: No current track is loaded on that bus.
audio.noPlayableTracks: No playable tracks found in this saved playlist.
actions.title: Title
actions.label: Label
actions.saveMapPresetFirst: Save a map preset in the Map tool first.
scripts.title: DMS Scripts
scripts.openToScan: Open scripts to scan saved DMS files.
search.title: Global Search
search.placeholder: Title, alias, tag, metadata, or body text
capture.title: Capture
prep.title: Prep Check
prep.runDescription: Run an on-demand broken reference audit before play.

pathPicker.label: Choose World Path
